title: Alien Notes
content:
Alien Notes


Intro music overlap into waking up seq

Breakfast sounds prelap cut to mess hall
Re record mark and Chris’s dialogue

Cross Dissolve between Dallas’ Mother seq and the Mess Hall, then dip to black before cut to spaceship landing

Linger a second or two longer on Dallas and Lambert walking with the weird lighting

Kane descending could be slow-mo’d a bit, and add like a slow blur, over exposure the lighting and make a bit darker

Start on Enrique’s second kneel

Dip to black after acid blood

Cut everything up to Kane waking up

Trim from the ‘He’s choking’ clip

Trim On from end Dallas in the air duct

Cross dissolve between Kane spinning and Ash Can You Hear Me
